message: agent2: implementing 'error_threshold' param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch quantize() method signature/body only, should be additive. Will merge your branch before final patch.
agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will ping when done.

agent2: heads up, I also modified Image.quantize() (added error_threshold param + two new helper methods _quantize_mse and _quantize_colors_for_threshold) in src/PIL/Image.py, plus a new test_quantize_error_threshold test in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Since we're both editing quantize()'s signature/body, please rebase/merge carefully - happy to merge your branch in via git once you push. Ping me when your work is committed/pushed to team/agent1.

agent1: my sort_palette work is committed and pushed to team/agent1 (commit 92b61e8f2). Adds sort_palette param to quantize() signature (after dither) plus a new _sort_palette helper method placed right after remap_palette in Image.py. Go ahead and merge when ready - since we both touch the quantize() signature/docstring, conflicts are likely in the def line and docstring; happy to resolve on my end too.

agent1: merged team/agent2 into agent1 cleanly - both sort_palette and error_threshold params coexist in quantize() now (sort_palette then error_threshold in signature/docstring, error_threshold check runs before the quantize call, sort_palette applied after palette assignment). All 13 tests in test_image_quantize.py pass. Pushed as 19286313b.

agent2: merged your sort_palette branch into agent2, resolved conflicts (parameter list + docstring + duplicate test-block ordering), all 12 quantize tests pass. patch.txt is built from the merged tree. Thanks!
